title: LangGraph: From Basics to Advanced AI Agents with LLMs
headline: Learn how to build custom AI Agents with LangGraph

instructor.name: Tensor Teach
instructor.title: AI Education That Bridges Theory and Practice

description: A structured, step-by-step approach to mastering AI agent development with LangGraph, guiding you from fundamental concepts to advanced techniques.
what_you_will_learn: Core principles of graphs, nodes, edges, and states as foundations of LangGraph workflows
Constructing a basic agent
Building a News Writer Agent
Integrating state and tools into agents
Reflection techniques
Human-in-the-loop processes
Checkpointers and threads
Incorporating custom tools for versatility and functionality
curriculum_sections: Advanced techniques: reflection, human-in-the-loop, checkpointers, threads

title: LangGraph Mastery: Develop LLM Agents with LangGraph
headline: Master the Power of LLM Agents with LangChain and LangGraph: Create AI Workflows, Automate Tasks and Transform Your Apps

instructor.name: Andrei Dumitrescu
instructor.title: Software Engineer, Crystal Mind Academy co-founder, 50,000+ students

description: Delves into LangGraph, an extension of LangChain specifically designed for agent and multi-agent workflows. Teaches building autonomous LLM agents, mastering agent workflows, multi-agent systems, and production-grade debugging techniques.
what_you_will_learn: Master LangGraph fundamentals including nodes, edges, and state management
Integrate LangChain with real-world tools for multi-agent workflows
Build autonomous agents with memory and tool observation capabilities
Implement RAG using Pinecone
Debug production applications with LangSmith
Understand LLM patterns: reflection and reflexion
Learn about Tavily AI and agentic search
Learn about flow engineering
curriculum_sections: Project 5 (Master Project): Research agent with LangGraph, GPT-4o, RAG, Pinecone, ArXiv, Google SerpAPI

reviews.quote: Course includes 5 hands-on projects building real-world LLM agent applications

title: LangGraph in Action: Develop Advanced AI Agents with LLMs
headline: Master the Fundamentals of AI Agents with LangGraph (Version 1.0.0)

instructor.name: Markus Lang
instructor.title: Software Engineer, Python Developer, LLM Expert in finance

description: Your ultimate guide to mastering the design and deployment of advanced AI agents using LangGraph. Explore fundamentals of building modular, scalable, and production-ready agents, all with a hands-on approach.
what_you_will_learn: State-based design with LangGraph's nodes and edges
Memory management: short-term memory with checkpointers and long-term memory with the Store object
Advanced workflows: human-in-the-loop systems, parallel execution, multi-agent patterns
Production-ready development: asynchronous operations, subgraphs
Full-stack applications using FastAPI and Docker
Unit testing LangGraph applications
curriculum_sections: TypedDict concepts and basic LangGraph workflows
Core agent creation, patterns, and design
RAG basics through advanced implementations with memory
Capstone: Full-stack project (FastAPI backend, Angular frontend, PostgreSQL, human-in-the-loop)

title: AI Agents: Develop Autonomous AI Agents with LangGraph [NEW]
headline: Develop High-Performance, Autonomous, AI Agents, Using LangChain, LangGraph (Python)

instructor.name: Paulo Dichone
instructor.title: Software Engineer, AWS Cloud Practitioner, 350,000+ students

description: Meticulously designed to elevate your understanding from beginner to advanced, enabling you to create scalable AI agents using LangChain and LangGraph. Build a comprehensive Financial Report Writer/Researcher Agent.
what_you_will_learn: Understand the fundamentals and significance of AI agents in various industries
Explore core principles, key characteristics, and diverse use cases of AI agents
Build a first simple AI agent using LLMs
Understand LangGraph building blocks and main components
Step-by-step agent construction from basic to advanced techniques
Build a full Financial Report Writer/Researcher Agent
Advanced optimization for efficient, scalable, high-performing agents
prerequisites: Knowledge of Python basics or any object-oriented modern programming language
curriculum_sections: Building your first simple agent with LLMs
Introduction to LangGraph: building blocks and components
Building agents with LangGraph (basic to advanced)
Advanced optimization techniques for scalability and performance

title: Basic RAG with LangChain and LangGraph - Ollama
headline: Step-by-Step Guide to RAG with LangChain, LangGraph, and Ollama | DeepSeek R1, QWEN, LLAMA, FAISS, Doclings, VectorDB

instructor.name: Laxmi Kant (KGP Talkie)
instructor.title: IIT Kharagpur graduate, Senior Data Science & AI Engineer, 100,000+ students

description: Step-by-step guide to building smart AI systems using LangChain, LangGraph, Ollama, and OpenAI to create Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems.
what_you_will_learn: Ollama setup: learn to set up and use Ollama for AI models
LangChain and LangGraph basics: understand the tools and how to use them together
Document loader (Doclings): load and prepare documents for AI systems
Vector stores and retrievals: use databases to find and retrieve information quickly
Agentic RAG: build AI systems that act like smart assistants
Create intelligent and adaptive RAG systems using agentic, corrective, adaptive, and self-improving methods
Deploy AI solutions using Streamlit and AWS EC2
prerequisites: Curiosity to learn and willingness to explore AI concepts
curriculum_sections: Deployment with Streamlit and AWS EC2
